findings.description: The third explicit benefit of the LIKE search feature is omitted: 'Javaの実装は、db-feature-5-label 機能と同様に、オブジェクトのフィールドの値を条件に設定できる' (i.e., object fields can be used as LIKE search conditions, same as the object-registration feature). The code example using `st.retrieve(entity)` implies this but does not state it as a distinct capability.
findings.source_evidence: * Javaの実装は、:ref:`db-feature-5-label` 機能と同様に、オブジェクトのフィールドの値を条件に設定できる。
